{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Alliance (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The Alliance will not be divided before the arrival of outsiders.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
